title: On the wave turbulence theory: ergodicity for the elastic beam wave   equation
summary:
We analyse a 3-wave kinetic equation, derived from the elastic beam wave
equation on the lattice. The ergodicity condition states that two distinct
wavevectors are supposed to be connected by a finite number of collisions. In
this work, we prove that the ergodicity condition is violated and the equation
domain is broken into disconnected domains, called no-collision and collisional
invariant regions. If one starts with a general initial condition, whose energy
is finite, then in the long-time limit, the solutions of the 3-wave kinetic
equation remain unchanged on the no-collision region and relax to local
equilibria on the disjoint collisional invariant regions.

AI.tldr: 证明了3波动力学方程中的遍历性条件被违反，解在长时间极限下在无碰撞区域保持不变，在碰撞不变区域松弛到局部平衡
AI.motivation: 研究从晶格弹性梁波方程导出的3波动力学方程，分析其遍历性条件是否成立，探讨长时间动力学行为
AI.techniques: 波动力学分析、遍历性条件检验、相空间分解、长时间极限分析、局部平衡态研究
AI.main_theorems: 1) 遍历性条件被违反；2) 方程定义域分解为无碰撞区域和碰撞不变区域；3) 长时间极限下解在无碰撞区域不变，在碰撞不变区域松弛到局部平衡
AI.significance: 揭示了波湍流系统中非遍历行为，对理解波能量传输和平衡态形成有重要意义，挑战了传统遍历性假设

title: Stationary curves under the M\"obius-Plateau energy
summary:
Plateau problems with elastic boundary energies have been of recent
theoretical and applied interest. However, strong assumptions have to be made
to avoid self-intersections of the boundary curve during energy minimization.
We introduce a class of Plateau problems for boundaries with self-repulsive
energies that obviates self-contact in energy minimization problems. For the
self-repulsive energy, we choose the M\"obius Energy introduced by O'Hara due
to its myriad regularity properties shown by Freedman et al. We first prove an
existence theorem for this M\"obius-Plateau problem in the class of closed
Lipschitz curves of a given irreducible knot-type spanned by immersed discs. We
then turn our attention to M\"obius-Plateau variations of helicoidal strips,
which are classified as "screw-like" or "ribbon-like" based on the signs of the
radii of the boundary helices. By analyzing the Euler-Lagrange equations, we
show that screw-like solutions are plentiful, whilst ribbon-like solutions
impose strong constraints on their parameters: they must have high frequency
(equivalently, low pitch), thin width in comparison to the frequency, and
remain close to the axis.

AI.tldr: 提出了带有Möbius自排斥能量的Plateau问题，避免了边界自相交，并在给定纽结类型下证明了存在性定理。
AI.motivation: 弹性边界能量的Plateau问题在理论和应用中都受到关注，但传统方法需要强假设来避免边界曲线在能量最小化过程中的自相交。本文引入自排斥能量来解决这一根本问题。
AI.techniques: 采用O'Hara的Möbius能量（具有良好正则性），在给定不可约纽结类型的闭Lipschitz曲线类中分析；通过欧拉-拉格朗日方程分析螺旋带状解的分类。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在给定不可约纽结类型的闭Lipschitz曲线类中，证明了Möbius-Plateau问题的存在性定理；2. 将螺旋带状解分类为"螺钉型"和"带状型"，并分析了参数约束条件。
AI.significance: 为Plateau问题提供了避免边界自相交的新框架，将纽结理论与曲面能量最小化相结合，对几何分析和材料科学中的薄膜形态研究有重要意义。

title: Localized and degenerate controls for the incompressible Navier-Stokes   system
comment:
38 pages, 7 figures, to be published in Communications on Pure and
  Applied Mathematics
summary:
We consider the global approximate controllability of the two-dimensional
incompressible Navier-Stokes system driven by a physically localized and
degenerate force. In other words, the fluid is regulated via four scalar
controls that depend only on time and appear as coefficients in an effectively
constructed driving force supported in a given subdomain. Our idea consists of
squeezing low mode controls into a small region, essentially by tracking their
actions along the characteristic curves of a linearized vorticity equation. In
this way, through explicit constructions and by connecting Coron's return
method with recent concepts from geometric control, the original problem for
the nonlinear Navier-Stokes system is reduced to one for a linear transport
equation steered by a global force. This article can be viewed as an attempt to
tackle a well-known open problem due to Agrachev.

AI.tldr: 通过将低模控制压缩到小区域，将非线性Navier-Stokes系统的全局近似可控性问题简化为线性输运方程的控制问题
AI.motivation: 研究二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes系统在物理局部化和退化力驱动下的全局近似可控性，该问题源于Agrachev提出的一个著名开放问题。流体通过四个仅依赖时间的标量控制进行调节，这些控制作为系数出现在给定子域中构造的有效驱动力中。
AI.techniques: 通过沿线性化涡度方程的特征曲线追踪控制作用，将低模控制压缩到小区域；结合Coron的返回方法和几何控制理论的新概念；通过显式构造将非线性Navier-Stokes问题简化为线性输运方程的控制问题。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes系统在局部化退化力驱动下的全局近似可控性；建立了将非线性控制问题简化为线性输运方程控制问题的理论框架。
AI.significance: 解决了Agrachev提出的一个重要开放问题；为Navier-Stokes系统的控制理论提供了新方法；将几何控制理论与流体力学控制问题相结合，具有重要的理论意义和应用价值。

title: Stability of the Catenoid for the Hyperbolic Vanishing Mean Curvature   Equation Outside Symmetry
summary:
We study the problem of stability of the catenoid, which is an asymptotically
flat rotationally symmetric minimal surface in Euclidean space, viewed as a
stationary solution to the hyperbolic vanishing mean curvature equation in
Minkowski space. The latter is a quasilinear wave equation that constitutes the
hyperbolic counterpart of the minimal surface equation in Euclidean space. Our
main result is the nonlinear asymptotic stability, modulo suitable translation
and boost (i.e., modulation), of the $n$-dimensional catenoid with respect to a
codimension one set of initial data perturbations without any symmetry
assumptions, for $n \geq 5$. The modulation and the codimension one restriction
on the data are necessary and optimal in view of the kernel and the unique
simple eigenvalue, respectively, of the stability operator of the catenoid.
  In a broader context, this paper fits in the long tradition of studies of
soliton stability problems. From this viewpoint, our aim here is to tackle some
new issues that arise due to the quasilinear nature of the underlying
hyperbolic equation. Ideas introduced in this paper include a new profile
construction and modulation analysis to track the evolution of the translation
and boost parameters of the stationary solution, a new scheme for proving
integrated local energy decay for the perturbation in the quasilinear and
modulation-theoretic context, and an adaptation of the vectorfield method in
the presence of dynamic translations and boosts of the stationary solution.

AI.tldr: 证明了n维悬链面(n≥5)在双曲零平均曲率方程中的非线性渐近稳定性，允许一维余维的初始扰动且无需对称性假设。
AI.motivation: 研究悬链面（欧氏空间中渐近平坦的旋转对称极小曲面）作为闵可夫斯基空间中双曲零平均曲率方程的稳态解的稳定性问题，这是双曲型孤子稳定性研究中的新挑战。
AI.techniques: 新的轮廓构造和调制分析追踪稳态解的平移与boost参数演化；在拟线性和调制理论背景下证明扰动局部能量衰减的新方案；适应动态平移和boost的向量场方法。
AI.main_theorems: 对于n≥5维悬链面，在允许一维余维的初始扰动且无需对称性假设下，证明了其非线性渐近稳定性（模适当的平移和boost调制）。
AI.significance: 这是双曲型孤子稳定性研究的重要进展，解决了拟线性双曲方程带来的新困难，发展了处理动态调制参数的稳定性分析方法，对几何波动方程和孤子理论有重要贡献。

title: Boundary Effects on the Controllability of Coupled KdV Systems
summary:
We study the exact boundary controllability of a nonlinear coupled system of
two Korteweg-de Vries equations on a bounded interval. The model describes the
interactions of two weakly nonlinear gravity waves in a stratified fluid. Due
to the nature of the system, six boundary conditions are required. However, to
study the controllability property, we consider a different combination of the
control inputs, with a maximum of four. Firstly, the results are obtained for
the linearized system through a classical duality approach and some hidden
regularity properties of the boundary terms. This approach reduces the
controllability problem to the study of a spectral problem, which is solved by
using the Paley-Wiener method introduced by Rosier. Then, the issue is to
establish when a certain quotient of entire functions still turns out to be an
entire function. It can be viewed as a problem of factoring an entire function
that, depending on the control configuration, leads to the study of a
transcendental equation. Finally, by using the contraction mapping theorem, we
derive the local controllability for the full system.

AI.tldr: 研究有界区间上非线性耦合KdV系统的精确边界可控性，通过谱分析和Paley-Wiener方法解决线性化系统的可控性，再通过压缩映射定理推广到非线性系统。
AI.motivation: 研究分层流体中两个弱非线性重力波相互作用的耦合KdV系统的边界可控性，该系统需要六个边界条件，但考虑最多四个控制输入的不同组合。
AI.techniques: 经典对偶方法、边界项的隐藏正则性性质、Paley-Wiener方法、谱分析、超越方程研究、压缩映射定理。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了线性化耦合KdV系统的精确边界可控性条件，通过谱问题分析确定控制配置下的可控性，并证明了完整非线性系统的局部可控性。
AI.significance: 为分层流体中波相互作用提供了可控性理论框架，发展了耦合非线性色散波系统的边界控制方法，扩展了Rosier的Paley-Wiener方法在耦合系统中的应用。

title: Unique continuation for the momentum ray transform
summary:
The present article focuses on a unique continuation result for certain
weighted ray transforms, utilizing the unique continuation property (UCP) of
the fractional Laplace operator. Specifically, we demonstrate a conservative
property for momentum ray transforms acting on tensors, as well as the
antilocality property for both weighted ray and cone transforms acting on
functions.

AI.tldr: 利用分数阶拉普拉斯算子的唯一延拓性质，证明了加权射线变换和动量射线变换的保守性及反局部性
AI.motivation: 研究加权射线变换的唯一延拓性质，利用分数阶拉普拉斯算子的UCP来建立射线变换的保守性和反局部性，解决积分几何中的唯一性问题
AI.techniques: 主要利用分数阶拉普拉斯算子的唯一延拓性质(UCP)，结合射线变换的解析性质，通过傅里叶分析和算子理论建立联系
AI.main_theorems: 证明了动量射线变换在张量上的保守性，以及加权射线变换和锥变换在函数上的反局部性
AI.significance: 为积分几何中的唯一性问题提供了新的理论工具，建立了分数阶算子与射线变换之间的深刻联系，在医学成像和地球物理反问题中有潜在应用

title: Conditions for existence of single valued optimal transport maps on   convex boundaries with nontwisted cost
comment:
47 pages, presentation significantly updated, accepted to Calc. Var.
  Partial Differential Equations. Comments welcome!
summary:
We prove that if $\Omega\subset \mathbb{R}^{n+1}$ is a (not necessarily
strictly) convex, $C^1$ domain, and $\mu$ and $\bar{\mu}$ are probability
measures absolutely continuous with respect to surface measure on $\partial
\Omega$, with densities bounded away from zero and infinity, whose
$2$-Monge-Kantorovich distance is sufficiently small, then there exists a
continuous Monge solution to the optimal transport problem with cost function
given by the quadratic distance on the ambient space $\mathbb{R}^{n+1}$. This
result is also shown to be sharp, via a counterexample when $\Omega$ is
uniformly convex but not $C^1$. Additionally, if $\Omega$ is $C^{1, \alpha}$
regular for some $\alpha$, then the Monge solution is shown to be H\"older
continuous.

AI.tldr: 证明了在凸C¹域上，当源和目标测度的2-Monge-Kantorovich距离足够小时，存在连续Monge解的最优传输问题
AI.motivation: 研究最优传输问题中Monge解的存在性和正则性，特别关注在凸域边界上概率测度之间的传输问题，其中成本函数是欧几里得距离的平方
AI.techniques: 使用Monge-Kantorovich距离分析、凸域几何性质、最优传输理论、连续性方法和反例构造技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在凸C¹域上，当源和目标测度的2-Monge-Kantorovich距离足够小时，存在连续Monge解；2. 通过反例证明当Ω一致凸但非C¹时结果不成立；3. 若Ω是C¹,α正则的，则Monge解是Hölder连续的
AI.significance: 为凸域上最优传输问题的正则性理论提供了重要结果，建立了测度接近性与解连续性之间的精确关系，对几何分析和偏微分方程理论有重要意义

title: Strongly hyperbolic quasilinear systems revisited, with applications to   relativistic fluid dynamics
summary:
We revisit the theory of first-order quasilinear systems with diagonalizable
principal part and only real eigenvalues, what is commonly referred to as
strongly hyperbolic systems. We provide a self-contained and simple proof of
local well-posedness, in the Hadamard sense, of the Cauchy problem. Our
regularity assumptions are very minimal. As an application, we apply our
results to systems of ideal and viscous relativistic fluids, where the theory
of strongly hyperbolic equations has been systematically used to study several
systems of physical interest.

AI.tldr: 为强双曲系统提供了局部适定性的简洁自包含证明，并将结果应用于相对论流体系统
AI.motivation: 重新研究具有对角化主部且仅含实特征值的一阶拟线性系统（强双曲系统），旨在建立该理论在Hadamard意义下的局部适定性，并应用于物理相关的相对论流体系统
AI.techniques: 使用强双曲系统的理论框架，提供自包含且简洁的证明方法，对正则性要求非常低，适用于理想和粘性相对论流体系统
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Cauchy问题在Hadamard意义下的局部适定性，正则性假设非常弱，并将该理论应用于理想和粘性相对论流体系统
AI.significance: 为强双曲系统理论提供了简洁而完整的证明框架，降低了正则性要求，扩展了该理论在物理系统（特别是相对论流体力学）中的应用范围，对偏微分方程理论和数学物理有重要意义

title: Mean curvature flow with multiplicity $2$ convergence in closed   manifolds
comment:
19 pages, 3 figures. Revisions have been made based on the comments
  of an anonymous referee. To appear in Mathematische Annalen
summary:
We construct new examples of immortal mean curvature flow of smooth embedded
connected hypersurfaces in closed manifolds, which converge to minimal
hypersurfaces with multiplicity $2$ as time approaches infinity.

AI.tldr: 构造了闭流形中光滑嵌入连通超曲面的永恒平均曲率流新例子，这些流以重数2收敛到极小超曲面。
AI.motivation: 平均曲率流是几何分析中的重要课题，研究超曲面在平均曲率驱动下的演化。以往研究多关注奇点形成和消失，而永恒流（无奇点）相对稀少，特别是收敛到重数2极小超曲面的情况。
AI.techniques: 使用几何偏微分方程方法，特别是平均曲率流的构造技术。可能涉及初始曲面的精心设计、稳定性分析、以及收敛性证明。
AI.main_theorems: 在闭流形中构造了光滑嵌入连通超曲面的永恒平均曲率流新例子，证明这些流当时间趋于无穷时以重数2收敛到极小超曲面。
AI.significance: 丰富了永恒平均曲率流的例子库，展示了重数2收敛的新现象，对理解平均曲率流的长期行为和极小超曲面的稳定性有重要意义。

title: Edge states in super honeycomb structures with PT-symmetric deformations
summary:
The existence of edge states is one of the most vital properties of
topological insulators. Although tremendous success has been accomplished in
describing and explaining edge states associated with PT symmetry breaking,
little work has been done on PT symmetry preserving cases. Two-dimensional
Schroedinger operators with super honeycomb lattice potentials always have
double Dirac cones at the Gamma point - the zero momentum point on their energy
bands due to C6 symmetry, PT symmetry, and the "folding" symmetry - caused by
an additional translation symmetry. There are two topologically different ways
to deform such a system by PT symmetry preserving but folding symmetry breaking
perturbations. Interestingly, there exist two gapped edge states on the
interface between such two kinds of perturbed materials. In this paper, we
illustrate the existence of such PT preserving edge states rigorously for the
first time. We use a domain wall modulated Schroedinger operator to model the
phenomenon under small perturbations and rigorously prove the existence of two
gapped edge states. We also provide a brief interpretation from the point of
view of "topology" by the parities of degenerate bulk modes. Our work
thoroughly explains the existence of "helical" like edge states in super
honeycomb configurations and lays a foundation for the descriptions of
topologies of such systems.

AI.tldr: 首次严格证明了在保持PT对称性的超蜂窝晶格系统中存在两个带隙边缘态
AI.motivation: 拓扑绝缘体的边缘态研究主要集中在PT对称性破缺的情况，而对于保持PT对称性的情况研究较少。超蜂窝晶格势能下的二维薛定谔算子由于C6对称性、PT对称性和"折叠"对称性，在Gamma点总是存在双狄拉克锥。通过保持PT对称性但破坏折叠对称性的扰动，系统有两种拓扑不同的变形方式。
AI.techniques: 使用域壁调制的薛定谔算子模型，在小扰动下进行严格数学分析；从拓扑角度通过简并体模的宇称性进行解释；结合对称性分析（C6、PT、折叠对称性）和微扰理论
AI.main_theorems: 严格证明了在两种拓扑不同的扰动材料界面处存在两个带隙边缘态；首次为保持PT对称性的超蜂窝晶格系统提供了严格的边缘态存在性证明；建立了此类系统拓扑描述的基础
AI.significance: 首次严格解释了超蜂窝结构中"螺旋"状边缘态的存在，填补了PT对称性保持情况下边缘态研究的空白；为理解此类系统的拓扑性质奠定了基础；对拓扑绝缘体理论和凝聚态物理中的对称性保护拓扑相有重要理论意义

title: Quantitative Hydrodynamic Stability for Couette Flow on Unbounded   Domains with Navier Boundary Conditions
summary:
We prove a stability threshold theorem for 2D Navier-Stokes on three
unbounded domains: the whole plane $\mathbb{R} \times \mathbb{R}$, the half
plane $\mathbb{R} \times [0,\infty)$ with Navier boundary conditions, and the
infinite channel $\mathbb{R} \times [-1, 1]$ with Navier boundary conditions.
Starting with the Couette shear flow, we consider initial perturbations
$\omega_{in}$ which are of size $\nu^{1/2}(1+\ln(1/\nu)^{1/2})^{-1}$ in an
anisotropic Sobolev space with an additional low frequency control condition
for the planar cases. We then demonstrate that such perturbations exhibit
inviscid damping of the velocity, as well as enhanced dissipation at
$x$-frequencies $|k| \gg \nu$ with decay time-scale $O(\nu^{-1/3}|k|^{-2/3})$.
On the plane and half-plane, we show Taylor dispersion for $x$-frequencies $|k|
\ll \nu$ with decay time-scale $O(\nu |k|^{-2})$, while on the channel we show
low frequency dispersion for $|k| \ll \nu$ with decay time-scale $O(\nu^{-1})$.
Generalizing the work of arXiv:2311.00141 done on $\mathbb{T} \times [-1,1]$,
the key contribution of this paper is to perform new nonlinear computations at
low frequencies with wave number $|k| \lesssim \nu$ and at intermediate
frequencies with wave number $\nu \lesssim |k| \leq 1$, and to provide the
first enhanced dissipation result for a fully-nonlinear shear flow on an
unbounded $x$-domain. Additionally, we demonstrate that the results of this
paper apply equally to solutions of the perturbed $\beta$-plane equations from
atmospheric dynamics.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维Navier-Stokes方程在三个无界区域上的稳定性阈值定理，首次在无界x-域上获得了完全非线性剪切流的增强耗散结果。
AI.motivation: 研究二维Navier-Stokes方程在无界区域上剪切流的稳定性问题，特别是Couette剪切流在初始扰动下的长时间行为，扩展了先前在周期区域上的工作到无界区域。
AI.techniques: 使用各向异性Sobolev空间、低频率控制条件、非线性计算（特别针对|k|≲ν和ν≲|k|≤1的频率范围）、增强耗散分析和Taylor色散分析。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了三个无界区域（全平面、半平面、无限通道）上的稳定性阈值定理，展示了速度的无粘性阻尼、增强耗散（|k|≫ν时衰减时间尺度O(ν^{-1/3}|k|^{-2/3})）以及Taylor色散（|k|≪ν时衰减时间尺度O(ν|k|^{-2})或O(ν^{-1})）。
AI.significance: 首次在无界x-域上获得了完全非线性剪切流的增强耗散结果，扩展了剪切流稳定性理论，为大气动力学中的β-平面方程提供了应用，推动了无界区域上Navier-Stokes方程稳定性理论的发展。

title: Almost-everywhere uniqueness of Lagrangian trajectories for $3$D   Navier--Stokes revisited
comment:
The statement of Theorem 1.3 was modified, making it slightly cleaner
  and stronger. Final accepted version
summary:
We show that, for any Leray solution $u$ to the $3$D Navier--Stokes equations
with $u_0\in L^2$, the associated deterministic and stochastic Lagrangian
trajectories are unique for Lebesgue a.e. initial condition. Additionally, if
$u_0\in H^{1/2}$, then pathwise uniqueness is established for the stochastic
Lagrangian trajectories starting from every initial condition. The result
sharpens and extends the original one by Robinson and Sadowski (Nonlinearity
2009) and is based on rather different techniques. A key role is played by a
newly established asymmetric Lusin--Lipschitz property of Leray solutions $u$,
in the framework of (random) Regular Lagrangian flows.

AI.tldr: 证明了3D Navier-Stokes方程Leray解的确定性和随机Lagrangian轨迹的唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究3D Navier-Stokes方程Leray解的Lagrangian轨迹唯一性问题，扩展Robinson和Sadowski (2009)的原始结果
AI.techniques: 使用非对称Lusin-Lipschitz性质、正则Lagrangian流框架、随机分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对L^2初值的Leray解，确定性和随机Lagrangian轨迹对Lebesgue几乎处处初值唯一；2) 对H^{1/2}初值，随机Lagrangian轨迹对所有初值路径唯一
AI.significance: 深化了对Navier-Stokes方程Lagrangian动力学的理解，为随机流体力学提供了理论基础，改进了现有唯一性结果

title: Scattering for the one dimensional Hartree Fock equation
summary:
We consider the Hartree-Fock equation in 1D, for a small and localised
initial data and a finite measure potential. We show that there is no long
range scattering due to a nonlinear cancellation between the direct term and
the exchange term for plane waves. We employ the framework of space-time
resonances that enables us to single out precisely this cancellation and to
obtain scattering to linear waves as a consequence.

AI.tldr: 证明了1D Hartree-Fock方程在小局部初值下存在线性波散射，通过直接项与交换项的非线性抵消消除了长程散射效应。
AI.motivation: 研究一维Hartree-Fock方程在有限测度势能和小局部初值下的散射行为，特别是探索直接项与交换项之间的非线性抵消如何消除长程散射效应。
AI.techniques: 采用时空共振框架，精确识别直接项与交换项之间的抵消机制，分析平面波的相互作用，证明散射到线性波的存在性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于小局部初值和有限测度势能，1D Hartree-Fock方程存在散射到线性波，不存在长程散射，这是通过直接项与交换项对平面波的非线性抵消实现的。
AI.significance: 揭示了Hartree-Fock方程中交换项的重要物理意义，为量子多体系统的散射理论提供了新见解，展示了时空共振方法在分析非线性抵消效应中的有效性。

title: Bernstein-von Mises theorems for time evolution equations
summary:
We consider a class of infinite-dimensional dynamical systems driven by
non-linear parabolic partial differential equations with initial condition
$\theta$ modelled by a Gaussian process `prior' probability measure. Given
discrete samples of the state of the system evolving in space-time, one obtains
updated `posterior' measures on a function space containing all possible
trajectories. We give a general set of conditions under which these
non-Gaussian posterior distributions are approximated, in Wasserstein distance
for the supremum-norm metric, by the law of a Gaussian random function. We
demonstrate the applicability of our results to periodic non-linear reaction
diffusion equations \begin{align*} \frac{\partial}{\partial t} u - \Delta u &=
f(u) \\ u(0) &= \theta \end{align*} where $f$ is any smooth and compactly
supported reaction function. In this case the limiting Gaussian measure can be
characterised as the solution of a time-dependent Schr\"odinger equation with
`rough' Gaussian initial conditions whose covariance operator we describe.

AI.tldr: 论文建立了无限维动力系统后验分布的Gaussian逼近理论，特别应用于非线性反应扩散方程。
AI.motivation: 研究由非线性抛物型偏微分方程驱动的无限维动力系统，其初始条件θ由高斯过程先验概率测度建模。给定系统在时空演化中的离散样本，需要在包含所有可能轨迹的函数空间上获得更新的后验测度。
AI.techniques: 使用Wasserstein距离（关于上确界范数度量）分析非高斯后验分布的高斯逼近；建立一般条件框架；应用非线性反应扩散方程理论；描述极限高斯测度作为具有"粗糙"高斯初始条件的时变Schrödinger方程解。
AI.main_theorems: 给出了一般条件集，使得非高斯后验分布在Wasserstein距离（上确界范数度量）下可由高斯随机函数的律逼近；将结果应用于周期非线性反应扩散方程，其中极限高斯测度可表征为具有特定协方差算子的时变Schrödinger方程解。
AI.significance: 为无限维动力系统的贝叶斯推断提供了理论基础，建立了非线性PDE系统后验分布的高斯逼近理论，对不确定性量化、数据同化和统计逆问题有重要应用价值。

title: A semigroup approach to the reconstruction theorem and the multilevel   Schauder estimate for singular modelled distributions
summary:
We extend the semigroup approach used in [23,21] to provide alternative
proofs of the reconstruction theorem and the multilevel Schauder estimate for
singular modelled distributions. As an application of them, we construct the
local-in-time solution of the two dimensional parabolic Anderson model with a
non-translation invariant differential operator.

AI.tldr: 将半群方法扩展到奇异建模分布的重构定理和多层Schauder估计，并应用于二维抛物Anderson模型的局部解构造
AI.motivation: 本文旨在扩展正则性结构理论中的半群方法，为奇异建模分布的重构定理和多层Schauder估计提供新的证明方法，并将这些理论结果应用于二维抛物Anderson模型的局部解构造问题
AI.techniques: 半群方法、正则性结构理论、奇异建模分布分析、重构定理证明、多层Schauder估计、抛物型偏微分方程理论
AI.main_theorems: 1) 奇异建模分布的重构定理新证明；2) 奇异建模分布的多层Schauder估计新证明；3) 二维抛物Anderson模型在非平移不变微分算子下的局部解存在性构造
AI.significance: 为奇异建模分布理论提供了新的分析工具，扩展了半群方法的应用范围，为处理更一般的抛物型随机偏微分方程提供了理论基础，特别是在非平移不变算子情形下的二维抛物Anderson模型

title: The Least Action Admissibility Principle
comment:
16 pages, ancillary Maple code verifies proof of Theorem 6, accepted
  for publication in Archive for Rational Mechanics and Analysis
summary:
This paper provides a new admissibility criterion for choosing physically
relevant weak solutions of the equations of Lagrangian and continuum mechanics
when non-uniqueness of solutions to the initial value problem occurs. The
criterion is motivated by the classical least action principle but is now
applied to initial value problems which exhibit non-unique solutions. Examples
are provided to Lagrangian mechanics and the Euler equations of barotropic
fluid mechanics. In particular, we show the least action admissibility
principle prefers the classical two shock solution to the Riemann initial value
problem to certain solutions generated by convex integration. On the other
hand, Dafermos's entropy criterion prefers convex integration solutions to the
two shock solutions. Furthermore, when the pressure is given by
$p(\rho)=\rho^2$, we show that the two shock solution is always preferred
whenever the convex integration solutions are defined for the same initial
data.

AI.tldr: 提出基于最小作用量原理的新可容许性准则，用于在拉格朗日力学和连续介质力学初值问题解不唯一时选择物理相关的弱解。
AI.motivation: 在拉格朗日力学和连续介质力学中，当初值问题存在非唯一解时，需要建立选择物理相关弱解的标准。经典的最小作用量原理通常用于边值问题，但本文将其推广到初值问题，特别是当存在多个弱解时。
AI.techniques: 将经典最小作用量原理推广到初值问题；比较最小作用量准则与Dafermos熵准则；分析拉格朗日力学和可压缩流体欧拉方程的具体例子；研究黎曼初值问题的两激波解与凸积分解。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 提出最小作用量可容许性准则作为选择物理相关弱解的新标准；2. 证明对于黎曼初值问题，最小作用量准则偏好经典两激波解而非凸积分解；3. 当压力为p(ρ)=ρ²时，证明只要凸积分解存在，两激波解总是被最小作用量准则偏好；4. 揭示最小作用量准则与Dafermos熵准则在解选择上的分歧。
AI.significance: 为连续介质力学中的弱解选择问题提供了新的物理基础；建立了最小作用量原理在初值问题中的应用框架；揭示了不同可容许性准则（最小作用量与熵条件）可能导致不同的物理解选择；对理解流体力学中激波解的非唯一性问题有重要意义。

title: On sharp anisotropic Hardy inequalities
summary:
Recently, Yanyan Li and Xukai Yan showed the following interesting Hardy
inequalities with anisotropic weights: Let $n\geq 2$, $p \geq 1$, $p\alpha >
1-n$, $p(\alpha + \beta)> -n$, then there exists $C > 0$ such that
$$\||x|^{\beta}|x'|^{\alpha+1} \nabla u\|_{L^p(\mathbb{R}^n)} \geq
C\||x|^\beta|x'|^\alpha u\|_{L^p(\mathbb{R}^n)}, \quad \forall\; u\in
C_c^1(\mathbb{R}^n).$$ Here $x' = (x_1,\ldots, x_{n-1}, 0)$ for $x = (x_i) \in
\mathbb{R}^n$. In this note, we will determine the best constant for the above
estimate when $p=2$ or $\beta \geq 0$. Moreover, as refinement for very special
case of Li-Yan's result in Adv. Math. 2023, we provide explicit estimate for
the anisotropic $L^p$-Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg inequality.

AI.tldr: 本文确定了Li-Yan各向异性Hardy不等式在p=2或β≥0时的最佳常数，并给出了各向异性L^p-Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式的显式估计。
AI.motivation: Li和Yan最近证明了带有各向异性权重的Hardy不等式，但未给出最佳常数。本文旨在确定该不等式在特定参数下的最佳常数，并改进Li-Yan在Adv. Math. 2023中的特殊结果。
AI.techniques: 使用Hardy不等式理论、变分方法、最佳常数计算技术，以及各向异性权重下的函数空间分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 确定了Li-Yan各向异性Hardy不等式在p=2或β≥0时的最佳常数；2. 给出了各向异性L^p-Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式的显式估计。
AI.significance: 完善了各向异性Hardy不等式理论，提供了精确的常数估计，对偏微分方程理论、几何分析和函数空间理论有重要意义。

title: Fractional nonlinear Schr\"odinger and Hartree equations in modulation   spaces
comment: 24 pages. New results for Hartree equations added
summary:
We establish global well-posedness for the mass subcritical nonlinear
fractional Schr\"odinger equation
  $$iu_t - (-\Delta)^\frac{\beta}{2} u+F(u)=0$$ having radial initial data in
modulation spaces $M^{p,\frac{p}{p-1}}(\mathbb R^n)$ for $n \geq 2, p>2$ and
$p$ sufficiently close to $2.$ The nonlinearity $F(u)$ is either of power-type
$F(u)=\pm (|u|^{\alpha}u)\; (0<\alpha<2\beta / n)$ or Hartree-type $(|x|^{-\nu}
\ast |u|^{2})u \; (0<\nu<\min\{\beta,n\}).$ Our order of dispersion $\beta$
lies in $(2n/ (2n-1), 2).$

AI.tldr: 建立了具有径向初值的分数阶Schrödinger方程在调制空间中的全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶Schrödinger方程在调制空间中的全局适定性问题，特别是针对径向初值和幂型或Hartree型非线性项
AI.techniques: 使用调制空间理论、径向对称性、分数阶色散估计、Strichartz估计和收缩映射原理
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在调制空间M^{p,p/(p-1)}中，对于径向初值、p>2且充分接近2时，质量次临界分数阶Schrödinger方程的全局适定性
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶Schrödinger方程在调制空间中的适定性理论，为低正则性初值问题提供了新的存在性结果

title: Enhanced Dissipation, Taylor Dispersion, and Inviscid Damping of Couette   flow in the Boussinesq system on the Plane
summary:
We consider the quantitative asymptotic stability of the stably stratified
Couette flow solution to the 2D fully dissipative nonlinear Boussinesq system
on $\mathbb{R}^2$ with large Richardson number $R > 1/4$, viscosity $\nu$ and
density dissipation $\kappa$. For an initial perturbation $(\omega_{in},
\theta_{in})$ of size $\mu^{1/2 + \epsilon}$ in a low-order anisotropic Sobolev
space, for $\mu$ roughly $\min(\nu, \kappa)\left(1 - O(1/\sqrt{R})\right)$ and
$\nu$, $\kappa$ comparable, we demonstrate asymptotic stability with explicit
enhanced dissipation and Taylor dispersion rates of decay. We also give
inviscid damping estimates on the velocity $u$ and the density $\theta$. This
is the first result of its type for the Boussinesq system on the fully
unbounded domain $\mathbb{R}^2$. We also translate some known linear results
from $\mathbb{T} \times \mathbb{R}$ to $\mathbb{R}^2$, and we give an
alternative theorem for the nonlinear result.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维完全耗散Boussinesq系统在无界域上大Richardson数下稳定分层Couette流的定量渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究二维完全耗散非线性Boussinesq系统在无界域上的稳定性问题，特别是稳定分层Couette流在大Richardson数下的渐近行为，这是该领域在完全无界域上的首个结果
AI.techniques: 使用各向异性Sobolev空间、增强耗散和Taylor色散衰减率分析、无粘阻尼估计、线性结果从$\mathbb{T} \times \mathbb{R}$到$\mathbb{R}^2$的转换
AI.main_theorems: 证明了初始扰动在低阶各向异性Sobolev空间中满足特定条件下，系统具有渐近稳定性，给出了显式的增强耗散和Taylor色散衰减率，以及速度场和密度的无粘阻尼估计
AI.significance: 这是Boussinesq系统在完全无界域$\mathbb{R}^2$上的首个定量渐近稳定性结果，为理解分层流体中的混合层稳定性提供了理论基础，对地球物理流体力学和大气海洋科学有重要意义

title: Weak-Strong Uniqueness and the d'Alembert Paradox
summary:
We prove conditional weak-strong uniqueness of the potential Euler solution
for external flow around a smooth body in three space dimensions, within the
class of viscosity weak solutions with the same initial data. Our sufficient
condition is the vanishing of the streamwise component of the skin friction in
the inviscid limit, somewhat weaker than the condition of Bardos-Titi in
bounded domains. Because global-in-time existence of the smooth potential
solution leads back to the d'Alembert paradox, we argue that weak-strong
uniqueness is not a valid criterion for "relevant" notions of generalized Euler
solution and that our condition is likely to be violated in the inviscid limit.
We prove also that the Drivas-Nguyen condition on uniform continuity at the
wall of the normal velocity component implies weak-strong uniqueness within the
general class of admissible weak Euler solutions in bounded domains.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维光滑物体外部流动中势流解的弱-强唯一性条件，并指出该条件在无粘极限下可能不成立
AI.motivation: 研究欧拉方程弱解与强解的唯一性问题，特别关注外部流动中势流解的情况，探讨无粘极限下弱-强唯一性作为广义欧拉解"相关性"判据的有效性
AI.techniques: 使用粘性弱解框架，分析边界层效应，比较Bardos-Titi条件和Drivas-Nguyen条件，研究无粘极限下的渐近行为
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了三维光滑物体外部流动中势流解的弱-强唯一性条件：流向表面摩擦在无粘极限下消失；2. 证明了Drivas-Nguyen条件（法向速度分量在壁面的一致连续性）在有界域内可容许弱解类中蕴含弱-强唯一性
AI.significance: 揭示了弱-强唯一性作为广义欧拉解"相关性"判据的局限性，指出d'Alembert悖论与势流解全局存在性的矛盾，对边界层理论和无粘极限研究有重要意义

title: On a coupled system of KP-type
comment:
updated abbreviations of equations for consistency of notation and
  polished abstract
summary:
A defining characteristic of the Kadomstev-Petviashvili (KP) model equation
is that the well-posedness results are subject to the restriction that at all
transverse positions, the mass $\int u \,dx = \text{constant independent of
$y$}.$ In 2007, for a rather general class of equations of KP type, it was
shown that the zero-mass (in $x$) constraint is satisfied at any non-zero time
even if it is not satisfied at initial time zero. To remedy this ``odd''
behavior, a model modification is introduced which does not impose non-physical
restrictions upon the initial data. In this article, we introduce a new
modified KP system, named the Non-KP model equation. After providing a
variational derivation of the Non-KP model, we analyze its Hamiltonian
evolutionary structure. Furthermore, we prove linear estimates in the Bourgain
spaces $X^{s,b}$ corresponding to the integral equation arising from the
Duhamel formulation of system.

AI.tldr: 提出新的Non-KP模型方程，解决了KP方程对初始数据需要满足零质量约束的非物理限制问题。
AI.motivation: KP方程在适定性研究中需要初始数据在所有横向位置满足零质量约束$\int u dx = \text{常数}$，这在实际物理问题中是不合理的。2007年研究表明即使初始时刻不满足该约束，在非零时刻也会自动满足，这种"奇怪"行为需要修正。
AI.techniques: 变分推导方法、哈密顿演化结构分析、Bourgain空间$X^{s,b}$中的线性估计、Duhamel公式的积分方程分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 通过变分原理推导出Non-KP模型方程；2. 分析该模型的哈密顿演化结构；3. 在Bourgain空间中证明线性估计，为后续非线性适定性研究奠定基础。
AI.significance: 解决了KP方程理论中长期存在的零质量约束问题，提出了更符合物理实际的模型，为KP类方程的适定性理论提供了新框架，可能在水波、等离子体物理等领域有应用价值。

title: On the stability of an inverse problem for waves via the Boundary   Control method
summary:
We establish a link between stability estimates for a hyperbolic inverse
problem via the Boundary Control method and the blowup of a constant appearing
in the contexts of optimal unique continuation and cost of approximate
controllability.

AI.tldr: 建立了双曲逆问题稳定性估计与最优唯一延拓及近似可控性代价中常数爆破之间的联系
AI.motivation: 研究双曲逆问题的稳定性估计，特别是通过边界控制方法，探索其与最优唯一延拓和近似可控性代价中出现的常数爆破现象之间的数学联系
AI.techniques: 边界控制方法、稳定性估计分析、最优唯一延拓理论、近似可控性代价分析、常数爆破现象研究
AI.main_theorems: 建立了双曲逆问题稳定性估计与最优唯一延拓及近似可控性代价中常数爆破之间的数学联系
AI.significance: 揭示了双曲逆问题稳定性估计与最优唯一延拓、近似可控性代价之间的深层数学联系，为理解逆问题稳定性提供了新的理论框架

title: On the blowup of quantitative unique continuation estimates for waves   and applications to stability estimates
summary:
In this paper we are interested in the blowup of a geometric constant
$\mathfrak{C}(\delta)$ appearing in the optimal quantitative unique
continuation property for wave operators. In a particular geometric context we
prove an upper bound for $\mathfrak{C}(\delta)$ as $\delta$ goes to $0$. Here
$\delta>0$ denotes the distance to the maximal unique continuation domain. As
applications we obtain stability estimates for the unique continuation property
up to the maximal domain. Using our abstract framework~\cite{FO25abstract} we
also derive a stability estimate for a hyperbolic inverse problem. The proof is
based on a global explicit Carleman estimate combined with the propagation
techniques of Laurent-L\'eautaud.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了波算子最优定量唯一延拓性质中几何常数𝔠(δ)的爆破行为，并给出了当δ→0时的上界估计。
AI.motivation: 研究波算子定量唯一延拓性质中几何常数𝔠(δ)的渐近行为，其中δ表示到最大唯一延拓域的距离。该常数在唯一延拓性质的稳定性估计中起关键作用，理解其爆破行为对于建立到最大域的稳定性估计至关重要。
AI.techniques: 全局显式Carleman估计与Laurent-Léautaud传播技术相结合，利用抽象框架[FO25abstract]推导结果。
AI.main_theorems: 在特定几何背景下证明了当δ→0时𝔠(δ)的上界估计，由此得到最大唯一延拓域的稳定性估计，并推导了双曲逆问题的稳定性估计。
AI.significance: 将唯一延拓的稳定性估计扩展到最大可能域，为双曲逆问题的稳定性分析提供了新工具，深化了对波算子定量唯一延拓性质的理解。

title: A general quasilinear elliptic problem with variable exponents and   Neumann boundary conditions for image processing
summary:
The aim of this paper is to state and prove existence and uniqueness results
for a general elliptic problem with homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions,
often associated with image processing tasks like denoising. The novelty is
that we surpass the lack of coercivity of the Euler-Lagrange functional with an
innovative technique that has at its core the idea of showing that the minimum
of the energy functional over a subset of the space $W^{1,p(x)}(\Omega)$
coincides with the global minimum. The obtained existence result applies to
multiple-phase elliptic problems under remarkably weak assumptions.

AI.tldr: 提出了处理非强制性Euler-Lagrange泛函的新技术，证明了具有齐次Neumann边界条件的椭圆问题解的存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究图像处理（如去噪）中常见的具有齐次Neumann边界条件的椭圆问题，解决由于Euler-Lagrange泛函缺乏强制性而带来的存在性证明困难
AI.techniques: 创新性地通过证明能量泛函在$W^{1,p(x)}(\Omega)$子集上的最小值与全局最小值重合来克服非强制性；使用变分方法、Sobolev空间理论和多相椭圆问题分析
AI.main_theorems: 在非常弱的假设条件下，建立了多相椭圆问题解的存在性和唯一性结果，特别适用于非强制性泛函情形
AI.significance: 为图像处理中的偏微分方程模型提供了严格的理论基础，发展了处理非强制性泛函的新方法，扩展了椭圆问题存在性理论的应用范围

title: Optimal Control of General Nonlocal Epidemic Models with Age and Space   Structure
summary:
We analyze a class of general nonlinear epidemic models with age and space
structure, including a nonlocal infection term depending on age and space.
After establishing the well-posedness of the state partial differential
equation, we introduce a control parameter interpreted as a vaccination rate.
Under certain conditions, we show that an optimal control exists and how it can
be characterized by first-order optimality conditions. Finally, we present
numerical examples of the optimal control problems governed by these models.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有年龄和空间结构的非线性流行病模型的最优控制理论框架
AI.motivation: 研究具有年龄和空间结构的流行病传播模型，这类模型能更真实地描述疾病传播的时空异质性和人口年龄结构影响，需要发展相应的最优控制理论来指导疫苗接种策略
AI.techniques: 偏微分方程适定性理论、最优控制理论、变分法、一阶最优性条件（Pontryagin极大值原理）、非局部积分项处理、数值优化方法
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了状态PDE的适定性；2) 证明了最优控制的存在性；3) 推导了一阶最优性条件来刻画最优控制；4) 提供了最优控制问题的数值实现
AI.significance: 为具有年龄和空间结构的复杂流行病模型提供了严格的最优控制理论框架，对公共卫生政策制定和疫苗接种策略优化具有重要应用价值

title: The asymptotic of the Mullins-Sekerka and the area-preserving curvature   flow in the planar flat torus
summary:
We study the asymptotic behavior of flat flow solutions to the periodic and
planar two-phase Mullins-Sekerka flow and area-preserving curvature flow. We
show that flat flows converge to either a finite union of equally sized
disjoint disks or to a finite union of disjoint strips or to the complement of
these configurations exponentially fast. A key ingredient in our approach is
the derivation of a sharp quantitative Alexandrov inequality for periodic
smooth sets.

AI.tldr: 证明了平面两相Mullins-Sekerka流和保面积曲率流的平坦流解的渐近行为，收敛到等尺寸圆盘、条带或其补集的有限并集
AI.motivation: 研究两相Mullins-Sekerka流和保面积曲率流的长期行为，这些是材料科学和几何流中的重要模型，描述相界面的演化
AI.techniques: 平坦流方法、尖锐定量Alexandrov不等式、周期性光滑集的几何分析、指数收敛速率估计
AI.main_theorems: 平坦流解指数快速收敛到三种几何构型之一：等尺寸圆盘有限并集、条带有限并集、或这些构型的补集
AI.significance: 为两相界面演化提供了完整的渐近分类，建立了尖锐的收敛速率，对理解材料科学中的相分离和几何流的长期行为有重要意义

title: Low Mach number limit for the diffusion approximation model in radiation   hydrodynamics at equilibrium-diffusion regime
summary:
The low Mach number limit for the compressible viscous diffusion
approximation model arising in radiation hydrodynamics is rigorously justified.
For the 3-D Cauchy problem, the solutions in an equilibrium diffusion regime
are shown to converge to the solutions of an incompressible Navier-Stokes
equations locally and globally in time as Mach number goes to zero, when the
effect of the small temperature variation upon the limit is taken into account.

AI.tldr: 严格证明了辐射流体力学中可压缩粘性扩散近似模型在低马赫数极限下收敛于不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程
AI.motivation: 研究辐射流体力学中的可压缩粘性扩散近似模型，探讨其在低马赫数极限下的渐近行为，建立从可压缩模型到不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的数学收敛性
AI.techniques: 低马赫数极限分析、能量估计、压缩性修正、平衡扩散区域分析、局部和全局时间收敛性证明
AI.main_theorems: 证明了三维柯西问题中，当马赫数趋于零时，平衡扩散区域内的解局部和全局收敛于不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的解，并考虑了小温度变化对极限的影响
AI.significance: 为辐射流体力学模型提供了严格的数学基础，建立了可压缩与不可压缩流体模型之间的桥梁，对理解辐射流体在低速极限下的行为有重要意义

title: Fourier mass lower bounds for Batchelor-regime passive scalars
summary:
Batchelor predicted that a passive scalar $\psi^\nu$ with diffusivity $\nu$,
advected by a smooth fluid velocity, should typically have Fourier mass
distributed as $|\hat \psi^\nu|^2(k) \approx |k|^{-d}$ for $|k| \ll
\nu^{-1/2}$. For a broad class of velocity fields, we give a quantitative lower
bound for a version of this prediction summed over constant width annuli in
Fourier space. This improves on previously known results, which require the
prediction to be summed over the whole ball.

AI.tldr: 该论文改进了Batchelor被动标量谱预测的定量下界，从对整个傅里叶球求和改进为对恒定宽度环形区域求和。
AI.motivation: Batchelor预测：在光滑流体速度场中，具有扩散系数ν的被动标量ψ^ν的傅里叶质量分布应满足|ψ^ν|^2(k) ≈ |k|^{-d}（当|k| ≪ ν^{-1/2}时）。先前结果需要在整个傅里叶球上求和该预测，本文旨在改进为对恒定宽度环形区域求和。
AI.techniques: 使用傅里叶分析、被动标量输运方程分析、谱方法，以及对Batchelor谱预测的定量下界估计技术。
AI.main_theorems: 对于一大类速度场，给出了Batchelor预测在傅里叶空间恒定宽度环形区域上求和版本的定量下界，这改进了先前需要在整个傅里叶球上求和的结果。
AI.significance: 提供了更精细的被动标量谱分布分析工具，对湍流混合、被动标量输运理论有重要意义，为验证Batchelor理论提供了更严格的数学基础。

title: Singular nonlocal elliptic systems via nonlinear Rayleigh quotient
summary:
In the present work, we establish the existence of two positive solutions for singular nonlocal elliptic systems. More precisely, we consider the following nonlocal elliptic problem: $$\left\{\begin{array}{lll} (-\Delta)^su +V_1(x)u = \lambda\frac{a(x)}{u^p} + \frac{\alpha}{\alpha+\beta}\theta |u|^{\alpha - 2}u|v|^{\beta}, \,\,\, \mbox{in} \,\,\, \mathbb{R}^N,\\ (-\Delta)^sv +V_2(x)v= \lambda \frac{b(x)}{v^q}+ \frac{\beta}{\alpha+\beta}\theta |u|^{\alpha}|v|^{\beta-2}v, \,\,\, \mbox{in} \,\,\, \mathbb{R}^N, \end{array}\right. \;\;\;(u, v) \in H^s(\mathbb{R}^N) \times H^s(\mathbb{R}^N),$$ where $ 0

0, \lambda > 0, N > 2s$, and $s \in (0,1)$. The potentials $V_1, V_2: \mathbb{R}^N \to \mathbb{R}$ are continuous functions which are bounded from below. Under our assumptions, we prove that there exists the largest positive number $\lambda^* > 0$ such that our main problem admits at least two positive solutions for each $\lambda \in (0, \lambda^*)$. Here we apply the nonlinear Rayleigh quotient together with the Nehari method. The main feature is to minimize the energy functional in Nehari set which allows us to prove our results without any restriction on the size of parameter $\theta > 0$. Moreover, we shall consider the multiplicity of solutions for the case $\lambda = \lambda^*$ where degenerated points are allowed.

AI.tldr: 证明了奇异非局部椭圆系统存在两个正解，并确定了存在解的最大参数范围
AI.motivation: 研究奇异非局部椭圆系统的多解性问题，这类问题在分数阶拉普拉斯算子框架下具有理论和应用意义，特别关注奇异项和耦合非线性项的影响
AI.techniques: 非线性Rayleigh商方法、Nehari流形技巧、能量泛函在Nehari集上的最小化、变分方法
AI.main_theorems: 存在最大正数λ* > 0，使得对每个λ ∈ (0, λ*)，主问题至少有两个正解；同时考虑了λ = λ*时退化点允许情况下的多解性
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异非局部椭圆系统的多解性理论，提供了不依赖于参数θ大小的存在性结果，为分数阶偏微分方程理论提供了新的工具和结果

authors:
Marcos. L. M. Carvalho,
  Minbo Yang
title: Multiplicity of solutions for singular elliptic problems with   Stein-Weiss term
summary:
In the present work, we establish the existence and multiplicity of positive
solutions for the singular elliptic equations with a double weighted nonlocal
interaction term defined in the whole space $\mathbb{R}^N$. The nonlocal term
and the fact that the energy functional is not differentiable are the main
difficulties for this kind of problem. We apply the Nehari method and the
nonlinear Rayleigh quotient to prove that our main problem has at least two
positive weak solutions. Furthermore, we prove a nonexistence result related to
the extreme $\lambda^*> 0$ given by the nonlinear Rayleigh quotient.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有双加权非局部相互作用项的奇异椭圆方程在全空间上存在多重正解
AI.motivation: 研究全空间上具有奇异性和双加权非局部项的椭圆方程，这类问题的非局部项和能量泛函不可微性是主要困难
AI.techniques: 使用Nehari方法和非线性Rayleigh商，结合变分法和临界点理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 至少存在两个正弱解；2. 关于非线性Rayleigh商给出的临界值λ*的非存在性结果
AI.significance: 为具有奇异性和非局部相互作用的椭圆方程提供了新的存在性理论，扩展了Nehari方法在不可微泛函情况下的应用

title: Ricci flow from singular spaces with bounded curvature
summary:
We show the existence of a solution to the Ricci flow with a compact length
space of bounded curvature, i.e., a space that has curvature bounded above and
below in the sense of Alexandrov, as its initial condition. We show that this
flow converges in the $C^{1,\alpha}$-sense to a $C^{1,\alpha}$-continuous
Riemannian manifold which is isometric to the original metric space. Moreover,
we prove that the flow is uniquely determined by the initial condition, up to
isometry.

AI.tldr: 证明了Ricci流在Alexandrov意义下有界曲率的紧致长度空间上存在解，且该流收敛到与原度量空间等距的C^{1,α}连续黎曼流形
AI.motivation: 研究Ricci流在非光滑初始条件下的存在性和收敛性，特别是当初始条件为Alexandrov意义下有界曲率的紧致长度空间时，这是经典光滑Ricci流向奇异度量空间的推广
AI.techniques: 使用Ricci流理论、Alexandrov几何、收敛理论、正则性理论，可能涉及逼近方法、比较几何和偏微分方程分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) Ricci流在Alexandrov有界曲率的紧致长度空间上存在解；2) 该流在C^{1,α}意义下收敛到C^{1,α}连续黎曼流形；3) 收敛极限与原度量空间等距；4) 流由初始条件唯一确定（模去等距）
AI.significance: 将Ricci流理论推广到奇异度量空间，为几何流在非光滑几何中的应用提供理论基础，可能对几何化猜想、奇点分析等有重要启示

title: Gradient estimates for the fractional $p$-Poisson equation
summary:
We consider local weak solutions to the fractional $p$-Poisson equation of
order $s$, i.e. $\left( - \Delta_p\right)^s u = f$. In the range $p>1$ and
$s\in \big(\frac{p-1}{p},1\big)$ we prove Calder\'on & Zygmund type estimates
at the gradient level. More precisely, we show for any $q>1$ that
\begin{equation*}
  f\in L^{\frac{qp}{p-1}}_{\rm loc}
  \quad\Longrightarrow\quad
  \nabla u\in L^{qp}_{\rm loc}. \end{equation*} The qualitative result is
accompanied by a local quantitative estimate.

AI.tldr: 证明了分数阶p-Laplace方程梯度水平的Calderón-Zygmund型估计
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶p-Poisson方程 $\left( - \Delta_p\right)^s u = f$ 的局部弱解的正则性理论，其中 $p>1$ 且 $s\in \big(\frac{p-1}{p},1\big)$，旨在建立梯度水平的Calderón-Zygmund型估计。
AI.techniques: 使用Calderón-Zygmund型估计方法，结合分数阶p-Laplace算子的特性，通过局部定量估计来证明梯度正则性提升。
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意 $q>1$，证明了 $f\in L^{\frac{qp}{p-1}}_{\rm loc} \Rightarrow \nabla u\in L^{qp}_{\rm loc}$，即右端项在局部Lebesgue空间中的正则性可以提升解梯度的局部正则性。
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶p-Laplace方程的正则性理论，建立了梯度水平的Calderón-Zygmund型估计，为这类非线性非局部方程的解的正则性分析提供了重要工具。

title: Invasion dynamics of super invaders: Elimination of Allee effects by a   strategy at the range boundary
summary:
Using a reaction-diffusion model with free boundaries in one space dimension
for a single population species with density $u(t,x)$ and population range
$[g(t), h(t)]$, we demonstrate that the Allee effects can be eliminated if the
species maintains its population density at a suitable level at the range
boundary by advancing or retreating the fronts. It is proved that with such a
strategy at the range edge the species can invade the environment successfully
with all admissible initial populations, exhibiting the dynamics of super
invaders. Numerical simulations are used to help understand what happens if the
population density level at the range boundary is maintained at other levels.
If the invading cane toads in Australia used this strategy at the range
boundary to become a super invader, then our results may explain why toads near
the invading front evolve to have longer legs and run faster.

AI.tldr: 证明了通过控制种群密度在边界上的水平可以消除Allee效应，使物种成为超级入侵者
AI.motivation: 研究具有自由边界的反应扩散模型中Allee效应的消除问题，解释入侵物种（如澳大利亚甘蔗蟾蜍）在边界上的演化行为
AI.techniques: 一维空间自由边界反应扩散模型，边界条件控制策略，数值模拟分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了通过在边界上维持合适的种群密度水平，可以消除Allee效应，使物种对所有初始种群都能成功入侵环境，表现出超级入侵者的动力学行为
AI.significance: 为理解入侵物种的边界演化提供了理论解释，特别是解释了为什么甘蔗蟾蜍在入侵前沿会演化出更长的腿和更快的奔跑速度

title: Fractional De Giorgi conjecture in dimension 2 via complex-plane methods
summary:
We provide a new proof of the fractional version of the De Giorgi conjecture
for the Allen-Cahn equation in $\mathbb{R}^2$ for the full range of exponents.
Our proof combines a method introduced by A. Farina in 2003 with the
$s$-harmonic extension of the fractional Laplacian in the half-space
$\mathbb{R}^{3}_+$ introduced by L. Caffarelli and L. Silvestre in 2007. We
also provide a representation formula for finite-energy weak solutions of a
class of weighted elliptic partial differential equations in the half-space
$\mathbb{R}^{n+1}_+$ under Neumann boundary conditions. This generalizes the
$s$-harmonic extension of the fractional Laplacian and allows us to relate a
general problem in the extended space with a nonlocal problem on the trace.

AI.tldr: 提出了Allen-Cahn方程分数阶De Giorgi猜想在二维全指数范围内的新证明，并建立了加权椭圆PDE在Neumann边界条件下的表示公式。
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶Allen-Cahn方程在二维空间中的De Giorgi猜想，该猜想涉及方程解的单调性和一维对称性。分数阶Laplacian的非局部特性使得经典方法不再适用，需要发展新的分析技术。
AI.techniques: 结合Farina（2003）的方法与Caffarelli-Silvestre（2007）的s-调和延拓技术；建立了加权椭圆PDE在Neumann边界条件下的表示公式；将扩展空间中的问题与迹上的非局部问题联系起来。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了二维分数阶Allen-Cahn方程De Giorgi猜想对所有指数的成立；2. 建立了半空间ℝⁿ⁺¹⁺中加权椭圆PDE在Neumann边界条件下有限能量弱解的表示公式。
AI.significance: 推广了经典De Giorgi猜想到分数阶情形，为分数阶PDE的对称性研究提供了新方法；建立的表示公式统一了扩展空间方法与迹上的非局部问题，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Limit of quasilinear equations and related extremal problems
summary:
We perform a complete analysis of the limiting behaviour of a class of
quasilinear problems with Dirichlet boundary data g. We show that the Lipschitz
constant of g plays a role in controlling the Gamma-convergence of the natural
energies. However the solutions converge uniformly to solution of a limiting
equation irrelevant to the Lipschitz constant of g. The limiting equation has
no coercivity in u. We prove that the limiting equation admits a weak
comparison principle and has a unique viscosity solution. We also obtain a
Poincare inequality in the Sobolev-Orlicz space for discontinuous operator,
which paves the way for our study of an extremal problem where its operator
becomes unbounded in a subdomain. Upon giving proper meaning to its solution,
we show that the extremal problem has a unique solution. It turns out the
solution has sufficient continuity, although operator is discontinuous. In the
appendix we provide some technical inequalities which play crucial roles in the
proof of uniqueness and we believe will be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 该论文完整分析了一类拟线性问题在极限情况下的行为，建立了Gamma收敛、极限方程解的唯一性以及间断算子下的极值问题解的存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有Dirichlet边界数据g的拟线性问题的极限行为，特别关注边界数据的Lipschitz常数对能量Gamma收敛的影响，以及当算子在某些子域无界时的极值问题。
AI.techniques: Gamma收敛理论、粘度解方法、弱比较原理、Sobolev-Orlicz空间中的Poincaré不等式、间断算子的极值问题分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 边界数据Lipschitz常数控制能量的Gamma收敛；2) 极限方程具有弱比较原理和唯一粘度解；3) 间断算子的Sobolev-Orlicz空间Poincaré不等式；4) 无界算子的极值问题存在唯一解且具有连续性。
AI.significance: 为拟线性问题的极限分析提供了完整框架，建立了间断算子下极值问题解的存在唯一性理论，发展了处理无界算子的新方法，技术不等式具有独立应用价值。

title: Dynamics of contact points in 2D Boussinesq flow
summary:
We consider the evolution of contact lines for thermal convection of viscous
fluids in a 2D open-top vessel. The domain is bounded above by a free moving
boundary and otherwise by the solid wall of a vessel. The dynamics of the fluid
are governed by the incompressible Boussinesq approximation under the influence
of gravity, and the interface between fluid and air is under the effect of
capillary forces. Motivated by energy-dissipation structure in [Guo-Tice, J.
Eur. Math. Soc, 2024], we develop global well posedness theory in the framework
of nonlinear energy methods for the initial data sufficiently close to
equilibrium. Moreover, the solutions decay to equilibrium at an exponential
rate. Our methods are mainly based on the construction of solutions to
convected heat equation and a priori estimates of a geometric formulation of
the Boussinesq equations.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维开口容器中粘性流体热对流接触线演化的全局适定性和指数衰减理论
AI.motivation: 研究开口容器中粘性流体热对流的接触线演化问题，该问题涉及自由移动边界、固壁边界、重力作用下的Boussinesq近似和毛细力作用的界面动力学
AI.techniques: 基于非线性能量方法，利用对流热方程解构造和Boussinesq方程几何形式的先验估计
AI.main_theorems: 对于充分接近平衡态的初始数据，建立了全局适定性理论，并证明解以指数速率衰减到平衡态
AI.significance: 扩展了Guo-Tice的能量耗散结构理论，为具有自由边界和接触线的热对流问题提供了严格的数学分析框架

title: The initial-to-final-state inverse problem with time-independent   potentials
summary:
The initial-to-final-state inverse problem consists in determining a quantum
Hamiltonian assuming the knowledge of the state of the system at some fixed
time, for every initial state. This problem was formulated by Caro and Ruiz and
motivated by the data-driven prediction problem in quantum mechanics. Caro and
Ruiz analysed the question of uniqueness for Hamiltonians of the form $-\Delta
+ V$ with an electric potential $V = V(\mathrm{t}, \mathrm{x})$ that depends on
the time and space variables. In this context, they proved that uniqueness
holds in dimension $n \geq 2$ whenever the potentials are bounded and have
super-exponential decay at infinity. Although their result does not seem to be
optimal, one would expect at least some degree of exponential decay to be
necessary for the potentials. However, in this paper, we show that by
restricting the analysis to Hamiltonians with time-independent electric
potentials, namely $V = V(\mathrm{x})$, uniqueness can be established for
bounded integrable potentials exhibiting only super-linear decay at infinity,
in any dimension $n \geq 2$. This surprising improvement is possible because,
unlike Caro and Ruiz's approach, our argument avoids the use of complex
geometrical optics (CGO). Instead, we rely on the construction of stationary
states at different energies -- this is possible because the potential does not
depend on time. These states will have an explicit leading term, given by a
Herglotz wave, plus a correction term that will vanish as the energy grows.
Besides the significant relaxation of decay assumptions on the potential, the
avoidance of CGO solutions is important in its own right, since such solutions
are not readily available in more complicated geometric settings.

AI.tldr: 证明了对于时间无关的量子哈密顿量，初态到终态逆问题的唯一性在超线性衰减势能下成立，显著改进了先前需要超指数衰减的条件。
AI.motivation: 研究量子力学中的初态到终态逆问题：给定系统在固定时刻的状态（对所有初始状态），确定量子哈密顿量。该问题由Caro和Ruiz提出，源于量子力学中的数据驱动预测问题。他们分析了含时势能的情况，但衰减条件要求过高。
AI.techniques: 避免使用复杂的几何光学(CGO)解，转而构造不同能量下的定态解；利用势能与时间无关的特性，构造具有显式主导项（Herglotz波）和能量增长时消失的修正项的波函数。
AI.main_theorems: 对于时间无关的势能V(x)，在任意维度n≥2中，只要势能有界可积且仅满足超线性衰减，初态到终态逆问题的唯一性成立。这显著改进了Caro和Ruiz需要超指数衰减的条件。
AI.significance: 1) 显著放宽了势能衰减条件（从超指数到超线性）；2) 避免了复杂的CGO解，使方法适用于更复杂的几何设置；3) 揭示了时间无关性在逆问题中的关键作用；4) 为量子力学逆问题提供了新的分析框架。

title: An inviscid limit problem for Navier-Stokes equations in 3D domains with   oscillatory boundaries
summary:
We study an inviscid limit problem for a class of Navier-Stokes equations
with vanishing measurable viscous coefficients in 3-dimensional spatial domains
whose boundaries are oscillatory, depending on a small parameter, and become
flat when the parameter converges to zero. Under some sufficient conditions on
the anisotropic vanishing rates of the eigenvalues of the matrices of the
viscous coefficients and the oscillatory parameter, we show that Leray-Hopf
weak solutions of the Navier-Stokes equations with no slip boundary condition
converge to solutions of the Euler equations in the upper half space. To prove
the result, we apply a change of variables to flatten the boundaries of the
spatial domains for the Navier-Stokes equations, and then construct the
boundary layer terms. As the Navier-Stokes equations and the Euler equations
are originally written in two different domains, additional boundary layer
terms are constructed and their estimates are obtained.

AI.tldr: 研究三维振荡边界区域中具有可测消失粘性系数的Navier-Stokes方程的无粘极限问题
AI.motivation: 研究具有可测消失粘性系数的Navier-Stokes方程在三维振荡边界区域中的无粘极限问题，边界随小参数振荡并在参数趋于零时变平，旨在建立Leray-Hopf弱解向Euler方程解的收敛性
AI.techniques: 通过变量变换将Navier-Stokes方程的边界展平，构造边界层项，处理两个方程在不同区域的问题，获得边界层估计
AI.main_theorems: 在粘性系数矩阵特征值的各向异性消失率和振荡参数的充分条件下，证明具有无滑移边界条件的Navier-Stokes方程的Leray-Hopf弱解收敛到上半空间中Euler方程的解
AI.significance: 扩展了无粘极限理论到具有振荡边界和可测消失粘性系数的复杂情况，为边界层分析和流体力学极限问题提供新方法

title: Well-posedness and blowup of 1D electron magnetohydrodynamics
summary:
The one-dimensional toy models proposed for the three-dimensional electron
magnetohydrodynamics in our previous work share some similarities with the
original dynamics under certain symmetry. We continue to study the
well-posedness issue and explore the potential singularity formation scenario
for these models.

AI.tldr: 研究一维电子磁流体动力学玩具模型的适定性和奇点形成可能性
AI.motivation: 该研究基于先前工作中提出的三维电子磁流体动力学的一维玩具模型，这些模型在特定对称性下与原始动力学具有相似性，旨在深入探讨这些模型的适定性问题并探索潜在的奇点形成场景。
AI.techniques: 使用一维简化模型分析技术，可能包括偏微分方程适定性理论、奇点形成分析、对称性约化方法等数学工具。
AI.main_theorems: 论文应包含关于一维电子磁流体动力学玩具模型适定性的定理结果，以及关于奇点形成可能性的分析结论，具体定理陈述需查看全文。
AI.significance: 为理解三维电子磁流体动力学的奇点形成机制提供简化模型的理论基础，有助于揭示复杂磁流体系统中奇点形成的数学本质。

title: Identifying point sources for biharmonic wave equation from the   scattered fields at sparse sensors
summary:
This work is dedicated to uniqueness and numerical algorithms for determining
the point sources of the biharmonic wave equation using scattered fields at
sparse sensors. We first show that the point sources in both $\mathbb{R}^2$ and
$\mathbb{R}^3$ can be uniquely determined from the multifrequency sparse
scattered fields. In particular, to deal with the challenges arising from the
fundamental solution of the biharmonic wave equation in $\mathbb{R}^2$, we
present an innovative approach that leverages the Fourier transform and
Funk-Hecke formula. Such a technique can also be applied for identifying the
point sources of the Helmholtz equation. Moreover, we present the uniqueness
results for identifying multiple point sources in $\mathbb{R}^3$ from the
scattered fields at sparse sensors with finitely many frequencies. Based on the
constructive uniqueness proofs, we propose three numerical algorithms for
identifying the point sources by using multifrequency sparse scattered fields.
The numerical experiments are presented to verify the effectiveness and
robustness of the algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出双调和波方程点源反演的唯一性理论和数值算法，利用稀疏传感器多频散射场数据
AI.motivation: 研究双调和波方程点源反演问题，旨在从稀疏传感器获取的多频散射场数据中唯一确定点源位置，解决实际应用中传感器数量有限时的反演难题
AI.techniques: 采用傅里叶变换和Funk-Hecke公式处理二维双调和波方程基本解，构建性唯一性证明方法，开发基于多频稀疏散射场的数值算法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了二维和三维空间中点源可从多频稀疏散射场唯一确定；建立了三维空间中有限频率下多个点源识别的唯一性结果
AI.significance: 为双调和波方程点源反演提供理论基础和实用算法，技术可推广到Helmholtz方程，在声学、电磁学等波传播反问题中有重要应用价值

title: Uniqueness of the strong positive solution for a general quasilinear   elliptic problem with variable exponents and homogeneous Neumann boundary   conditions using a generalization of the $p(x)$-D\'{i}az-Saa inequality
summary:
In this paper, we study a generalization of the D\'iaz-Saa inequality and its
applications to nonlinear elliptic problems. We first present the necessary
hypotheses and preliminary results before introducing an improved version of
the inequality, which holds in a broader functional setting and allows
applications to problems with homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions. The
significance of cases where the inequality becomes an equality is also
analyzed, leading to uniqueness results for certain classes of partial
differential equations. Furthermore, we provide a detailed proof of a
uniqueness theorem for strong positive solutions and illustrate our findings
with two concrete applications: a multiple-phase problem and an elliptic
quasilinear equation relevant to image processing. The paper concludes with
possible directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 推广Díaz-Saa不等式并应用于非线性椭圆问题，得到更广泛的函数框架下的改进版本及其在Neumann边界条件下的应用。
AI.motivation: 研究Díaz-Saa不等式的推广，以处理更广泛的非线性椭圆问题，特别是具有齐次Neumann边界条件的问题，并探索不等式取等号情况下的唯一性结果。
AI.techniques: 改进的Díaz-Saa不等式证明、函数分析、偏微分方程理论、Neumann边界条件处理、唯一性定理的详细证明。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在更广泛函数框架下的改进Díaz-Saa不等式；2) 不等式取等号情况的分析；3) 强正解的唯一性定理；4) 应用于多相问题和图像处理中的椭圆拟线性方程。
AI.significance: 扩展了经典不等式在非线性椭圆问题中的应用范围，为具有Neumann边界条件的问题提供了新工具，在图像处理等领域有实际应用价值。

title: Remainder terms, profile decomposition and sharp quantitative stability   in the fractional nonlocal Sobolev-type inequality with $n>2s$
summary:
In this paper, we study the following fractional nonlocal Sobolev-type
inequality
  \begin{equation*}
  C_{HLS}\bigg(\int_{\mathbb{R}^n}\big(|x|^{-\mu} \ast |u|^{p_s}\big)|u|^{p_s}
dx\bigg)^{\frac{1}{p_s}}\leq\|u\|_{\dot{H}^s(\mathbb{R}^n)}^2\quad \mbox{for
all}~~u\in \dot{H}^s(\mathbb{R}^n),
  \end{equation*}
  induced by the classical fractional Sobolev inequality and
Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev inequality for $s\in(0,\frac{n}{2})$, $\mu\in(0,n)$
and where $p_{s}=\frac{2n-\mu}{n-2s}\geq2$ is energy-critical exponent. The
$C_{HLS}>0$ is a constant depending on the dimension $n$, parameters $s$ and
$\mu$, which can be achieved by $W(x)$, and up to translation and scaling,
$W(x)$ is the unique positive and radially symmetric extremal function of the
nonlocal Sobolev-type inequality. It is well-known that, up to a suitable
scaling,
  \begin{equation*}
  (-\Delta)^{s}u=(|x|^{-\mu}\ast |u|^{p_s})|u|^{p_s-2}u\quad \mbox{for
all}~~u\in\dot{H}^s(\mathbb{R}^n),
  \end{equation*}
  is the Euler-Lagrange equation corresponding to the associated minimization
problem.
  In this paper, we first prove the non-degeneracy of positive solutions to the
critical Hartree equation for all $s\in(0,\frac{n}{2})$, $\mu\in(0,n)$ with
$0<\mu\leq4s$. Furthermore, we show the existence of a gradient type remainder
term and, as a corollary, derive the existence of a remainder term in the weak
$L^{\frac{n}{n-2s}}$-norm for functions supported in domains of finite measure,
under the condition $s\in(0,\frac{n}{2})$. Finally, we establish a Struwe-type
profile decomposition and quantitative stability estimates for critical points
of the above inequality in the parameter region $s\in(0,\frac{n}{2})$ with the
number of bubbles $\kappa\geq1$, and for $\mu\in(0,n)$ with $0<\mu\leq4s$. In
particular, we provide an example to illustrate the sharpness of our result for
$n=6s$ and $\mu=4s$.

AI.tldr: 证明了分数阶非局部Sobolev型不等式中临界Hartree方程正解的非退化性，并建立了Struwe型剖面分解和定量稳定性估计
AI.motivation: 研究由经典分数阶Sobolev不等式和Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev不等式诱导的非局部Sobolev型不等式，该不等式与能量临界指数相关，对应的Euler-Lagrange方程是临界Hartree方程
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、非局部椭圆方程理论、谱分析、Struwe型剖面分解技术、定量稳定性估计方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对所有s∈(0,n/2), μ∈(0,n)且0<μ≤4s，证明了临界Hartree方程正解的非退化性；2. 建立了梯度型余项和弱L^{n/(n-2s)}范数余项；3. 在参数区域s∈(0,n/2)且μ∈(0,n)且0<μ≤4s时，建立了Struwe型剖面分解和临界点的定量稳定性估计
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶非局部Sobolev不等式的研究，为临界Hartree方程提供了重要的谱性质，建立了新的稳定性结果，对理解分数阶椭圆方程的解结构和稳定性有重要意义

title: Perfectly matched layers in time domain. A simple two-dimensional error   analysis
summary:
Perfectly Matched Layers (PML) has become a very common method for the
numerical approximation of wave and wave-like equations on unbounded domains.
This technique allows one to obtain accurate solutions while working on a
finite computational domain, and the technique is relatively simple to
implement. Results concerning the accuracy of the PML method have been
obtained, but mostly with regard problems at a fixed frequency. In this paper
we provide very explicit time-domain bounds on the accuracy of PML for the
two-dimensional wave equation and illustrate our conclusions with some
numerical examples.

AI.tldr: 为二维波动方程提供了PML方法在时域中的显式误差估计
AI.motivation: 完美匹配层(PML)是无界域上波动方程数值近似的常用方法，但现有精度分析主要针对固定频率问题，缺乏时域误差估计
AI.techniques: 时域分析、波动方程理论、PML误差估计、数值验证
AI.main_theorems: 给出了二维波动方程PML方法在时域中的显式误差界，并通过数值算例验证
AI.significance: 填补了PML方法时域误差分析的理论空白，为实际计算提供了理论保证，对波动方程数值模拟有重要指导意义

title: Variational analysis of discrete Dirichlet problems in periodically   perforated domains
summary:
In this paper we study the asymptotic behavior of a family of discrete
functionals as the lattice size, $\varepsilon>0$, tends to zero. We consider
pairwise interaction energies satisfying $p$-growth conditions, $p<d$, $d$
being the dimension of the reference configuration, defined on discrete
functions subject to Dirichlet conditions on a $\delta$-periodic array of small
squares of side $r_{\delta}\sim \delta^{d/d-p}$. Our analysis is performed in
the framework of $\Gamma$-convergence and we prove that, in the regime
$\varepsilon=o(r_{\delta})$, the discrete energy and their continuum
counterpart share the same $\Gamma$-limit and the effect of the constraints
leads to a capacitary term in the limit energy as in the classical theory of
periodically perforated domains for local integral functionals.

AI.tldr: 研究离散泛函在晶格尺寸趋于零时的渐近行为，证明在特定尺度关系下离散能量与连续能量具有相同的Γ极限，约束效应导致极限能量中出现容度项
AI.motivation: 研究离散泛函在晶格尺寸趋于零时的渐近行为，分析满足p-增长条件的成对相互作用能量，探讨Dirichlet边界条件对离散函数的影响，建立离散能量与连续能量之间的Γ收敛关系
AI.techniques: Γ收敛理论框架，离散变分方法，周期穿孔域理论，容度分析，尺度分析（ε=o(r_δ)），p-增长条件处理
AI.main_theorems: 在ε=o(r_δ)的尺度关系下，离散能量与连续能量具有相同的Γ极限，约束效应在极限能量中产生容度项，类似于经典周期穿孔域理论中的局部积分泛函
AI.significance: 建立了离散系统与连续系统之间的Γ收敛关系，将经典周期穿孔域理论推广到离散泛函情形，为离散系统的连续极限分析提供了理论框架，在材料科学和计算数学中有潜在应用

title: On the well-posedness of a certain model with the bi-Laplacian appearing   in the Mathematical Biology
summary:
The work is devoted to the global well-posedness in W^{1, (4, 2)}(R\times
R^{+}) of the integro-differential problem involving the square of the one
dimensional Laplace operator along with the drift term. Our proof is based on a
fixed point technique. Moreover, we provide the assumption leading to the
existence of the nontrivial solution for the problem under the consideration.
Such equation is relevant to the cell population dynamics in the Mathematical
Biology.

AI.tldr: 证明了带漂移项的一维拉普拉斯算子平方的积分-微分问题在W^{1,(4,2)}空间中的全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究源于数学生物学中细胞群体动力学的积分-微分方程，涉及一维拉普拉斯算子的平方和漂移项，需要建立解的存在唯一性理论
AI.techniques: 基于不动点技术（fixed point technique），在Sobolev空间W^{1,(4,2)}中构造压缩映射
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在W^{1,(4,2)}(R×R⁺)空间中的全局适定性；2. 给出非平凡解存在的充分条件
AI.significance: 为数学生物学中的细胞群体动力学模型提供了严格的数学基础，建立了高阶算子与漂移项组合的积分-微分方程解的存在唯一性理论

title: On Brezis' First Open Problem: A Complete Solution
summary:
In 2023, H.\,Brezis published a list of his ``favorite open problems", which
he described as challenges he had ``raised throughout his career and has
resisted so far". We provide a complete resolution to the first one--Open
Problem 1.1--in Brezis's favorite open problems list: the existence of
solutions to the long-standing Brezis-Nirenberg problem on a three-dimensional
ball. Furthermore, using the building blocks of Del Pino-Musso-Pacard-Pistoia
sign-changing solutions to the Yamabe problem, we establish the existence of
infinitely many sign-changing, nonradial solutions for the full range of the
parameter.

AI.tldr: 完全解决了Brezis-Nirenberg问题在三维球上的存在性，并构造了无穷多变号非径向解
AI.motivation: 解决Brezis在2023年提出的"最喜爱开放问题"列表中的第一个问题——三维球上的Brezis-Nirenberg问题，这是一个长期未解决的经典问题
AI.techniques: 利用Del Pino-Musso-Pacard-Pistoia在Yamabe问题中构造变号解的建筑块方法，构建无穷多非径向变号解
AI.main_theorems: 1. 完全解决了三维球上的Brezis-Nirenberg问题存在性；2. 构造了参数全范围内无穷多变号、非径向解
AI.significance: 解决了Brezis提出的重要开放问题，为椭圆型偏微分方程理论提供了新结果，扩展了Yamabe问题解构造方法的应用范围

title: Generic non-degeneracy of critical points of multiple Green functions on   torus and applications to curvature equations
summary:
Let $E_{\tau}:=\mathbb{C}/(\mathbb{Z}+\mathbb{Z}\tau)$ with
$\operatorname{Im}\tau>0$ be a flat torus and $G(z;\tau)$ be the Green function
on $E_{\tau}$ with the singularity at $0$. Consider the multiple Green function
$G_{n}$ on $(E_{\tau})^{n}$: \[
G_{n}(z_{1},\cdots,z_{n};\tau):=\sum_{i<j}G(z_{i}-z_{j};\tau)-n\sum_{i=1}%
^{n}G(z_{i};\tau). \] Recently, Lin (J. Differ. Geom. to appear) proved that
there are at least countably many analytic curves in $\mathbb H=\{\tau :
\operatorname{Im}\tau>0\}$ such that $G_n(\cdot;\tau)$ has degenerate critical
points for any $\tau$ on the union of these curves. In this paper, we prove
that there is a measure zero subset $\mathcal{O}_n\subset \mathbb H$
(containing these curves) such that for any $\tau\in \mathbb
H\setminus\mathcal{O}_n$, all critical points of $G_n(\cdot;\tau)$ are
non-degenerate.
  Applications to counting the exact number of solutions of the curvature
equation $\Delta u+e^{u}=\rho \delta_{0}$ on $E_{\tau}$
  will be given.

AI.tldr: 证明了在平环面上，除了一个零测集外，多重格林函数的临界点都是非退化的
AI.motivation: 研究平环面$E_{\tau}$上多重格林函数$G_n$的临界点性质，特别是临界点的非退化性问题。这个问题与曲率方程$\Delta u+e^{u}=\rho \delta_{0}$的解的计数密切相关。
AI.techniques: 使用复分析、椭圆函数理论、格林函数分析，以及测度论方法处理参数空间$\mathbb H$中的例外集
AI.main_theorems: 存在一个零测集$\mathcal{O}_n\subset \mathbb H$，使得对于任意$\tau\in \mathbb H\setminus\mathcal{O}_n$，$G_n(\cdot;\tau)$的所有临界点都是非退化的
AI.significance: 解决了多重格林函数临界点的非退化性问题，为曲率方程解的确切计数提供了理论基础，深化了对平环面上非线性椭圆方程解结构的理解

title: Stability of propagating terraces in spatially periodic multistable   equations in $\mathbb{R}^N$
summary:
In this paper, we study the large time behaviour of solutions of multistable
reaction-diffusion equations in $\mathbb{R}^N$, with a spatially periodic
heterogeneity. By multistable, we mean that the problem admits a finite -- but
arbitrarily large -- number of stable, periodic steady states. In contrast with
the more classical monostable and bistable frameworks, which exhibit the
emergence of a single travelling front in the long run, in the present case the
large time dynamics is governed by a family of stacked travelling fronts,
involving intermediate steady states, called propagating terrace. Their
existence in the multidimensional case has been established in our previous
work [13]. The first result of the present paper is their uniqueness. Next, we
show that the speeds of the propagating terraces in different directions
dictate the spreading speeds of solutions of the Cauchy problem, for both
planar-like and compactly supported initial data. The latter case turns out to
be much more intricate than the former, due to the fact that the propagating
terraces in distinct directions may involve different sets of intermediate
steady states. Another source of difficulty is that the Wulff shape of the
speeds of travelling fronts can be non-smooth, as we show in the bistable case
using a result of [4].

AI.tldr: 研究多维周期异质多稳态反应扩散方程解的长时间行为，建立了传播阶梯的唯一性及其在Cauchy问题传播速度中的决定性作用。
AI.motivation: 研究多维周期异质多稳态反应扩散方程的长时间动力学行为。经典的单稳态和双稳态框架在长时间下通常产生单个行波前，而多稳态情形（具有任意有限多个稳定周期稳态）则表现出更复杂的动力学，由涉及中间稳态的传播阶梯（stacked travelling fronts）控制。
AI.techniques: 使用传播阶梯理论、行波前分析、Wulff形状分析、Cauchy问题传播速度估计。处理多维周期异质环境下的多稳态结构，分析不同方向传播阶梯的相互作用。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 传播阶梯的唯一性；2. 传播阶梯速度决定Cauchy问题的传播速度（包括平面状初值和紧支集初值）；3. 在双稳态情形下，行波前速度的Wulff形状可能非光滑。
AI.significance: 首次在多维周期异质多稳态反应扩散方程中建立了传播阶梯的唯一性及其与传播速度的精确关系，揭示了多稳态系统比经典单/双稳态更丰富的长时间动力学行为，为理解复杂反应扩散系统的传播机制提供了理论基础。

title: Local H\"older regularity for bounded, signed solutions to nonlocal   Trudinger equations
summary:
We prove local H\"older regularity for bounded and sign-changing weak
solutions to nonlocal Trudinger equations of the form \[ (|u|^{p-2}u)_t +
\text{P.V.} \int_{\mathbb{R}^n} \frac{|u(x,t) -
u(y,t)|^{p-2}(u(x,t)-u(y,t))}{|x-y|^{n+sp}} = 0, \]
  in the range $1< p<\infty$ and $s \in (0,1)$. One of the main difficulties in
extending the local theory to the nonlocal Trudinger equation is that when $0
\ll u \ll \infty$ locally, a crucial change of variable is unavailable in the
nonlocal case due to the presence of the Tail term. We adapt several new ideas
developed in the past few years to prove the required H\"older regularity.

AI.tldr: 证明了非局部Trudinger方程有界变号弱解的局部Hölder正则性
AI.motivation: 研究非局部Trudinger方程的正则性理论，该方程结合了时间导数和分数阶p-Laplacian算子，是经典Trudinger方程的非局部推广
AI.techniques: 采用近年来发展的新思想，克服非局部情形下Tail项带来的困难，处理局部理论中关键变量变换不可用的挑战
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当$1< p<\infty$和$s \in (0,1)$时，非局部Trudinger方程有界变号弱解的局部Hölder正则性
AI.significance: 将局部Trudinger方程的正则性理论推广到非局部情形，为非局部抛物型方程的正则性理论提供重要进展

title: On a class of globally analytic Hypoelliptic operators with non-negative   characteristic form
summary:
The global analytic hypoellipticity is proved for a class of second order
partial differential equations with non-negative characteristic form globally
defined on the torus. The class considered in this work generalizes at some
degree the class of sum of squares considered by Bove-Chinni and also by
Cordaro-Himonas.

AI.tldr: 证明了环面上具有非负特征形式的二阶偏微分方程的全局解析超椭圆性
AI.motivation: 研究环面上具有非负特征形式的二阶偏微分方程的全局解析超椭圆性，推广了Bove-Chinni和Cordaro-Himonas研究的平方和算子类
AI.techniques: 使用偏微分方程理论、全局解析超椭圆性分析、非负特征形式算子研究、环面几何上的分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了环面上某类具有非负特征形式的二阶偏微分方程具有全局解析超椭圆性，该类算子推广了Bove-Chinni和Cordaro-Himonas研究的平方和算子
AI.significance: 扩展了全局解析超椭圆性理论，为环面上具有非负特征形式的偏微分方程提供了新的正则性结果，在偏微分方程理论和几何分析中有重要应用

title: Core-radius approximation of singular minimizers in nonlinear elasticity
summary:
We study a variational model in nonlinear elasticity allowing for cavitation
which penalizes both the volume and the perimeter of the cavities.
Specifically, we investigate the approximation (in the sense of
{\Gamma}-convergence) of the energy by means of functionals defined on
perforated domains. Perforations are introduced at flaw points where
singularities are expected and, hence, the corresponding deformations do not
exhibit cavitation. Notably, those points are not prescribed but rather
selected by the variational principle. Our analysis is motivated by the
numerical simulation of cavitation and extends previous results on models which
solely accounted for elastic energy but neglected contributions related to the
formation of cavities.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个考虑空穴体积和周长的非线性弹性变分模型，并通过穿孔域的Γ-收敛逼近来数值模拟空穴形成
AI.motivation: 研究非线性弹性中的空穴形成问题，传统模型只考虑弹性能量而忽略空穴形成本身的能量贡献，需要发展能同时处理空穴体积和周长的变分模型
AI.techniques: Γ-收敛逼近、穿孔域方法、变分原理、非线性弹性理论、空穴形成分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了考虑空穴体积和周长惩罚的变分模型，证明了通过穿孔域的能量泛函Γ-收敛逼近，其中穿孔点由变分原理自动选择而非预先指定
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性弹性中空穴形成的理论框架，为数值模拟提供了严格的数学基础，首次同时考虑了空穴体积和周长的能量贡献
